inputs.label: Total Cholesterol
inputs.businessContext: Lipid panel total cholesterol measurement (typical range: 100–400 mg/dL)

businessContext_i18n.en: Lipid panel total cholesterol measurement (typical range: 100–400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lipid paneli toplam kolesterol ölçümü (tipik aralık: 100–400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure du cholestérol total du bilan lipidique (plage typique : 100–400 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.es: Medición de colesterol total del panel lipídico (rango típico: 100–400 mg/dL)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüksek yoğunluklu lipoprotein ölçümü (tipik aralık: 20–100 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure des lipoprotéines de haute densité (plage typique : 20–100 mg/dL)
businessContext_i18n.es: Medición de lipoproteínas de alta densidad (rango típico: 20–100 mg/dL)

inputs.label: Triglycerides
inputs.businessContext: Triglycerides measurement (must be ≤400 mg/dL for Friedewald formula validity)

businessContext_i18n.en: Triglycerides measurement (must be ≤400 mg/dL for Friedewald formula validity)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trigliserit ölçümü (Friedewald formülü geçerliliği için ≤400 mg/dL olmalıdır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Triglyceridmessung (muss ≤400 mg/dL für Gültigkeit der Friedewald-Formel sein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure des triglycérides (doit être ≤400 mg/dL pour la validité de la formule de Friedewald)
businessContext_i18n.es: Medición de triglicéridos (debe ser ≤400 mg/dL para validez de la fórmula de Friedewald)

inputs.label: Direct LDL (if available)
inputs.businessContext: Set to >0 to override calculation with direct LDL measurement; 0 triggers Friedewald computation

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to >0 to override calculation with direct LDL measurement; 0 triggers Friedewald computation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan LDL ölçümü ile hesaplamayı geçersiz kılmak için >0 ayarlayın; 0, Friedewald hesaplamasını tetikler
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf >0 setzen, um die Berechnung mit direkter LDL-Messung zu überschreiben; 0 löst Friedewald-Berechnung aus
businessContext_i18n.fr: Définir >0 pour remplacer le calcul par une mesure directe du LDL ; 0 déclenche le calcul de Friedewald
businessContext_i18n.es: Establecer en >0 para anular el cálculo con medición directa de LDL; 0 activa el cálculo de Friedewald

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
